title: astragalus desereticus
intro: Astragalus desereticus, also known as Deseret milkvetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It is native to the western United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Astragalus desereticus include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
